risks.risk: Real provider SDK apply is not executed by this repository
risks.mitigation: Keep the shared boundary provider-neutral and require an approved manual gate record before any production-like apply.

risks.risk: Manual gate approvals are still in-memory in product tests
risks.mitigation: Safe summaries and tests enforce single-use behavior; production use still needs durable approval storage.

risks.risk: Apply evidence could expose provider secrets if future adapters bypass the shared boundary
risks.mitigation: Safe result sanitization and docs require secret references only, plus no secret/private URL/wallet/raw user data in apply summaries.

risks.risk: Local forge may be unavailable on this machine
risks.nextPr: tooling setup if local contract verification is required
risks.mitigation: Rely on GitHub contracts check unless local Foundry is installed.
